hooks.prompt: Check if the user's message starts with the word 'query' (case-insensitive, ignoring whitespace). If yes, respond with: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "Query detected: After answering this query, automatically create a wiki/outputs/ page with the answer and update wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md accordingly."}}. If no, respond with: {"continue": true}
